column6:
CLTK2 but unique OSDP settings to pass SIA testing 

[osdp]
; Does the COMSET command kill secure channe
comset_kills_sc = true
; Are stacked AV commands allowed
allow_stacked_osdp_av_cmds = false
; Is secure channel allowed over the broadcast address
prevent_sc_with_ba = false
; Does secure channel formation require SCS-15
prevent_sc_no_scs_15 = false
; Is SCBK required for secure channel (versus allowing SCBK-D)
sc_exclusive = true
